subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned before the Prisoner! Hearken unto the call of the Hidden Name Who hath appeared in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها المذکور لدی المسجون ان استمع ندآء اسم المکنون الذی ظهر بالحق
subcodes.subjects: @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @detachment in teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @empty learning; false spirituality
